1→package com.court.assistant.sms
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.net.Uri
     5→import android.provider.Telephony
     6→
     7→data class RawSms(
     8→    val sender: String,
     9→    val body: String,
    10→    val date: Long
    11→)
    12→
    13→class SmsReader(private val context: Context) {
    14→    private val courtKeywords = listOf("法院", "开庭", "传票", "案件", "送达", "court.gov.cn", "案号")
    15→
    16→    fun readCourtSms(): List<RawSms> {
    17→        val smsList = mutableListOf<RawSms>()
    18→        val uri = Telephony.Sms.CONTENT_URI
    19→        val projection = arrayOf(
    20→            Telephony.Sms.ADDRESS,
    21→            Telephony.Sms.BODY,
    22→            Telephony.Sms.DATE
    23→        )
    24→        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(
    25→            uri, projection, null, null,
    26→            "${Telephony.Sms.DATE} DESC"
    27→        ) ?: return emptyList()
    28→
    29→        cursor.use {
    30→            val addrIdx = it.getColumnIndexOrThrow(Telephony.Sms.ADDRESS)
    31→            val bodyIdx = it.getColumnIndexOrThrow(Telephony.Sms.BODY)
    32→            val dateIdx = it.getColumnIndexOrThrow(Telephony.Sms.DATE)
    33→            while (it.moveToNext()) {
    34→                val body = it.getString(bodyIdx) ?: continue
    35→                if (courtKeywords.any { kw -> body.contains(kw) }) {
    36→                    smsList.add(RawSms(
    37→                        sender = it.getString(addrIdx) ?: "",
    38→                        body = body,
    39→                        date = it.getLong(dateIdx)
    40→                    ))
    41→                }
    42→            }
    43→        }
    44→        return smsList
    45→    }
    46→}
    47→

1→package com.court.assistant.webview

     3→import android.webkit.WebResourceRequest
     4→import android.webkit.WebView
     5→import android.webkit.WebViewClient
     6→
     7→class CourtWebViewClient(
     8→    private val onPdfDetected: (url: String) -> Unit,
     9→    private val onPageLoaded: () -> Unit
    10→) : WebViewClient() {
    11→
    12→    override fun shouldOverrideUrlLoading(view: WebView?, request: WebResourceRequest?): Boolean {
    13→        val url = request?.url?.toString() ?: return false
    14→        if (isPdfUrl(url)) {
    15→            onPdfDetected(url)
    16→            return true
    17→        }
    18→        return false
    19→    }
    20→
    21→    override fun onPageFinished(view: WebView?, url: String?) {
    22→        super.onPageFinished(view, url)
    23→        onPageLoaded()
    24→    }
    25→
    26→    private fun isPdfUrl(url: String): Boolean {
    27→        val lower = url.lowercase()
    28→        return lower.endsWith(".pdf") || lower.contains(".pdf?") || lower.contains("getpdf")
    29→    }
    30→}

package com.court.assistant.data.db

import androidx.room.*

@Entity(
    tableName = "court_sms",
    indices = [Index(value = ["bodyHash"], unique = true)]
)
data class CourtSmsEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val sender: String,
    val body: String,
    val bodyHash: Int,
    val receivedAt: Long,
    val caseNumber: String?,
    val courtName: String?,
    val hearingTime: Long?,
    val partyNames: String?,
    val webUrl: String?,
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null
)

     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.graphics.Bitmap
     5→import android.graphics.pdf.PdfRenderer
     6→import android.os.ParcelFileDescriptor
     7→import com.google.mlkit.vision.common.InputImage
     8→import com.google.mlkit.vision.text.TextRecognition
     9→import com.google.mlkit.vision.text.chinese.ChineseTextRecognizerOptions
    10→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    11→import kotlinx.coroutines.suspendCancellableCoroutine
    12→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    13→import java.io.File
    14→import java.util.*
    15→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
    16→
    17→data class SubpoenaInfo(
    18→    val caseNumber: String?,       // 案号
    19→    val courtName: String?,       // 法院简称
    20→    val hearingTime: Long?,       // 应到时间
    21→    val defendant: String?,        // 被传唤人
    22→    val handler: String?,         // 承办人
    23→    val location: String?,        // 应到处所
    24→    val phone: String?           // 电话
    25→)
    26→
    27→class PdfParser(private val context: Context) {
    28→
    29→    suspend fun parseSubpoena(filePath: String): SubpoenaInfo? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    30→        val text = extractText(filePath)
    31→        if (text.isNullOrBlank()) return@withContext null
    32→        parseSubpoenaText(text)
    33→    }
    34→
    35→    private suspend fun extractText(filePath: String): String? {
    36→        // 先尝试 iText 提取
    37→        val iTextResult = extractWithIText(filePath)
    38→        if (!iTextResult.isNullOrBlank() && iTextResult.any { it.code > 0x4E00 }) {
    39→            return iTextResult
    40→        }
    41→        // 回退到 OCR
    42→        return extractWithOcr(filePath)
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    private fun extractWithIText(filePath: String): String? {
    46→        return try {
    47→            val reader = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.PdfReader(filePath)
    48→            val doc = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.PdfDocument(reader)
    49→            val sb = StringBuilder()
    50→            for (i in 1..doc.numberOfPages) {
    51→                val text = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.canvas.parser.PdfTextExtractor.getTextFromPage(doc.getPage(i))
    52→                sb.appendLine(text)
    53→            }
    54→            doc.close()
    55→            sb.toString()
    56→        } catch (_: Exception) { null }
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    private suspend fun extractWithOcr(filePath: String): String? {
    60→        val file = File(filePath)
    61→        if (!file.exists()) return null
    62→        val fd = ParcelFileDescriptor.open(file, ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY)
    63→        val renderer = PdfRenderer(fd)
    64→        val sb = StringBuilder()
    65→        val recognizer = TextRecognition.getClient(ChineseTextRecognizerOptions.Builder().build())
    66→
    67→        for (i in 0 until renderer.pageCount) {
    68→            val page = renderer.openPage(i)
    69→            val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(page.width * 2, page.height * 2, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)
    70→            page.render(bitmap, null, null, PdfRenderer.Page.RENDER_MODE_FOR_DISPLAY)
    71→            page.close()
    72→
    73→            val text = suspendCancellableCoroutine<String?> { cont ->
    74→                val image = InputImage.fromBitmap(bitmap, 0)
    75→                recognizer.process(image)
    76→                    .addOnSuccessListener { result -> cont.resume(result.text) }
    77→                    .addOnFailureListener { cont.resume(null) }
    78→            }
    79→            if (text != null) sb.appendLine(text)
    80→            bitmap.recycle()
    81→        }
    82→        renderer.close()
    83→        fd.close()
    84→        return sb.toString().takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    private fun parseSubpoenaText(text: String): SubpoenaInfo {
    88→        val caseNumber = Regex("[（(]\\d{4}[）)][^\\s，。]+号").find(text)?.value
    89→        val courtName = Regex("(.+?法院)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)
    90→
    91→        // 提取被传唤人（优先提取"被传唤人"或"被告"）
    92→        val defendant = try {
    93→            // 优先匹配"被传唤人"
    94→            Regex("被传唤人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
    95→                // 其次匹配"被告"
    96→                ?: Regex("被告[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
    97→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
    98→
    99→        // 提取承办人（法官/审判员）
   100→        val handler = try {
   101→            listOf(
   102→                Regex("承办人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   103→                Regex("审判[长员][：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   104→                Regex("法官[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   105→                Regex("经办人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)")
   106→            ).firstNotNullOfOrNull { it.find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim() }
   107→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
   108→
   109→        // 提取联系电话
   110→        val phone = try {
   111→            listOf(
   112→                Regex("电话[：:]?\\s*([1][3-9]\\d{9})"),
   113→                Regex("联系电话[：:]?\\s*([1][3-9]\\d{9})"),
   114→                Regex("手机[：:]?\\s*([1][3-9]\\d{9})"),
   115→                Regex("联系方式[：:]?\\s*([1][3-9]\\d{9})"),
   116→                Regex("(?:tel|Tel|TEL)[：:]?\\s*([1][3-9]\\d{9})")
   117→            ).firstNotNullOfOrNull { it.find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim() }
   118→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
   119→
   120→        val location = Regex("(?:应到地点|地[点址])[：:]?\\s*(\\S+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)
   121→
   122→        var hearingTime: Long? = null
   123→        val timeMatch = Regex("(?:应到时间|开庭时间|定于)[：:]?\\s*(\\d{4})[年-](\\d{1,2})[月-](\\d{1,2})[日]?\\s*(\\d{1,2})[时点:：](\\d{0,2})").find(text)
   124→        if (timeMatch != null) {
   125→            val cal = Calendar.getInstance().apply {
   126→                set(timeMatch.groupValues[1].toInt(),
   127→                    timeMatch.groupValues[2].toInt() - 1,
   128→                    timeMatch.groupValues[3].toInt(),
   129→                    timeMatch.groupValues[4].toInt(),
   130→                    timeMatch.groupValues[5].takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.toInt() ?: 0, 0)
   131→                set(Calendar.MILLISECOND, 0)
   132→            }
   133→            hearingTime = cal.timeInMillis
   134→        }
   135→
   136→        return SubpoenaInfo(caseNumber, courtName, hearingTime, defendant, handler, location, phone)
   137→    }
   138→}

1→package com.court.assistant.sms
     2→
     3→import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
     4→import java.util.*
     5→
     6→data class ParsedSms(
     7→    val caseNumber: String?,
     8→    val courtName: String?,
     9→    val hearingTime: Long?,
    10→    val partyNames: String?,
    11→    val webUrl: String?
    12→)
    13→
    14→class SmsParser {
    15→    // 案号: （2024）鲁1312民初1324号
    16→    private val caseNumberPattern = Regex("[（(]\\d{4}[）)][^\\s，。,\\.]+号")
    17→    // 法院名称: 【xxx法院】
    18→    private val courtPattern = Regex("【(.+?法院[）】]?)")
    19→    // 当事人: 】xxx你好 or 】xxx，你好
    20→    private val partyPattern = Regex("】(\\S+?)(?:你好|，你好|,你好)")
    21→    // URL
    22→    private val urlPattern = Regex("https?://[^\\s<>\"]+")
    23→    // 开庭时间 - 多种格式
    24→    private val datePatterns = listOf(
    25→        Regex("(\\d{4})年(\\d{1,2})月(\\d{1,2})日[\\s]*(\\d{1,2})[时点:：](\\d{0,2})"),
    26→        Regex("(\\d{4})-(\\d{1,2})-(\\d{1,2})\\s+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2})"),
    27→        Regex("(\\d{4})/(\\d{1,2})/(\\d{1,2})\\s+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2})")
    28→    )
    29→
    30→    fun parse(body: String): ParsedSms {
    31→        val caseNumber = caseNumberPattern.find(body)?.value
    32→        val courtFull = courtPattern.find(body)?.groupValues?.getOrNull(1)
    33→        val courtName = courtFull?.let { simplifyCourtName(it) }
    34→        val partyNames = partyPattern.find(body)?.groupValues?.getOrNull(1)
    35→        val webUrl = urlPattern.find(body)?.value
    36→        val hearingTime = parseHearingTime(body)
    37→
    38→        return ParsedSms(
    39→            caseNumber = caseNumber,
    40→            courtName = courtName,
    41→            hearingTime = hearingTime,
    42→            partyNames = partyNames,
    43→            webUrl = webUrl
    44→        )
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    private fun simplifyCourtName(name: String): String {
    48→        // 去掉省市前缀，保留区+法院
    49→        // "临沂市河东区人民法院" -> "河东区法院"
    50→        val cleaned = name.replace("】", "").replace("【", "")
    51→        val match = Regex("(\\S+?[区县市旗])人民法院").find(cleaned)
    52→        if (match != null) {
    53→            val district = match.groupValues[1]
    54→            // 取最后一个行政区划
    55→            val parts = Regex("[省市州盟]").split(district)
    56→            return "${parts.last()}法院"
    57→        }
    58→        return cleaned.replace("人民", "")
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    private fun parseHearingTime(text: String): Long? {
    62→        for (pattern in datePatterns) {
    63→            val match = pattern.find(text) ?: continue
    64→            try {
    65→                val year = match.groupValues[1].toInt()
    66→                val month = match.groupValues[2].toInt()
    67→                val day = match.groupValues[3].toInt()
    68→                val hour = match.groupValues[4].toInt()
    69→                val minute = match.groupValues.getOrNull(5)?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.toInt() ?: 0
    70→                val cal = Calendar.getInstance().apply {
    71→                    set(year, month - 1, day, hour, minute, 0)
    72→                    set(Calendar.MILLISECOND, 0)
    73→                }
    74→                return cal.timeInMillis
    75→            } catch (_: Exception) { continue }
    76→        }
    77→        return null
    78→    }
    79→}
    80→

2. **PDF下载后没有触发解析** - 需要检查 `downloadPdf` 流程

我已经分析完代码了。权限和基本流程都已实现，问题可能出在以下几个地方：

**问题诊断：**

1. **短信同步到日历的条件** (`MainViewModel.kt:77`)：
   ```kotlin
   if (id > 0 && parsed.hearingTime != null && parsed.caseNumber != null)
   ```
   只有当短信中能解析出开庭时间和案号时才会同步。很多法院短信只包含链接，不直接包含时间。

2. **PDF同步的触发条件** (`MainViewModel.kt:116`)：
   ```kotlin
   if (isSubpoena) {
       parseAndSyncSubpoena(pdfId, result.filePath, smsId)
   }
   ```
   只有文件名包含"传票"才会自动解析同步。

好的，我来设计新的同步算法。核心问题是：

**当前问题：**
1. 短信同步依赖短信文本中直接包含开庭时间 - 但很多短信只有链接
2. PDF同步只在文件名含"传票"时触发 - 漏掉很多传票
3. 没有统一的同步入口

**新算法设计：**

1. **智能PDF识别** - 不仅看文件名，还分析PDF内容判断是否为传票
2. **统一同步流程** - 所有PDF下载后都尝试解析开庭信息
3. **添加手动同步按钮** - 用户可以对任意PDF触发同步

    25→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    26→@Composable
    27→fun PdfPreviewScreen(
    28→    viewModel: MainViewModel,
    29→    pdfId: Long,
    30→    onBack: () -> Unit
    31→) {
    32→    var pdf by remember { mutableStateOf<PdfDocumentEntity?>(null) }
    33→    var pages by remember { mutableStateOf<List<Bitmap>>(emptyList()) }
    34→    var error by remember { mutableStateOf<String?>(null) }
    35→
    36→    LaunchedEffect(pdfId) {
    37→        val doc = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    38→            val app = viewModel.getApplication<com.court.assistant.CourtApp>()
    39→            app.repository.getPdfById(pdfId)
    40→        }
    41→        pdf = doc
    42→        if (doc != null) {
    43→            try {
    44→                pages = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) { renderPdfPages(doc.filePath) }
    45→            } catch (e: Exception) {
    46→                error = "无法预览: ${e.message}"
    47→            }
    48→        }
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    Scaffold(
    52→        topBar = {
    53→            TopAppBar(

    69→                )

    71→        }

    73→        Column(
    74→            modifier = Modifier
    75→                .fillMaxSize()
    76→                .padding(padding)

    78→        ) {
    79→            // 开庭信息卡片（如果是传票）
    80→            pdf?.hearingInfo?.let { info ->
    81→                Card(
    82→                    modifier = Modifier
    83→                        .fillMaxWidth()
    84→                        .padding(12.dp),
    85→                    colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = CinnabarRed.copy(alpha = 0.08f)),
    86→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(8.dp)
    87→                ) {

    89→                        Text(
    90→                            "📋 开庭信息",
    91→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    92→                            color = CinnabarRed
    93→                        )
    94→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
    95→                        Text(

    98→                            color = InkBlack
    99→                        )

   102→                            Text(

   104→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   105→                                color = JadeGreen
   106→                            )
   107→                        }
   108→                    }
   109→                }
   110→            }
   111→
   112→            if (error != null) {
   113→                Text(
   114→                    error!!,
   115→                    color = CinnabarRed,
   116→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp)
   117→                )
   118→            }
   119→
   120→            // PDF 页面渲染
   121→            pages.forEachIndexed { index, bitmap ->
   122→                Image(
   123→                    bitmap = bitmap.asImageBitmap(),
   124→                    contentDescription = "第 ${index + 1} 页",
   125→                    modifier = Modifier
   126→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   127→                        .padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
   128→                    contentScale = ContentScale.FillWidth
   129→                )
   130→            }
   131→
   132→            if (pages.isEmpty() && error == null) {
   133→                CircularProgressIndicator(
   134→                    modifier = Modifier
   135→                        .align(Alignment.CenterHorizontally)
   136→                        .padding(32.dp),
   137→                    color = CinnabarRed
   138→                )
   139→            }
   140→        }
   141→    }
   142→}
   143→
   144→private fun renderPdfPages(filePath: String): List<Bitmap> {
   145→    val file = File(filePath)
   146→    if (!file.exists()) return emptyList()
   147→    val fd = ParcelFileDescriptor.open(file, ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY)
   148→    val renderer = PdfRenderer(fd)
   149→    val bitmaps = mutableListOf<Bitmap>()
   150→    for (i in 0 until renderer.pageCount) {
   151→        val page = renderer.openPage(i)
   152→        val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(page.width * 2, page.height * 2, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)
   153→        page.render(bitmap, null, null, PdfRenderer.Page.RENDER_MODE_FOR_DISPLAY)
   154→        page.close()
   155→        bitmaps.add(bitmap)
   156→    }
   157→    renderer.close()
   158→    fd.close()
   159→    return bitmaps
   160→}
